name: rabbit-feature
summary: Dispatcher-side feature-touch orchestration surface. Owns the rabbit-feature-touch skill and four general-purpose helper skills (rabbit-feature-scope, rabbit-feature-spec, rabbit-feature-new, rabbit-feature-audit) plus their backing scripts (resolve-scope.py, format-feature-context.py, new-feature.py). Executor-side TDD machinery (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py, tdd-step.py) lives in tdd-subagent and tdd-state-machine and is consumed via the cross-feature contract.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: spec change (1.9.0 -> 1.10.0; Inv 40 addition introducing the manifest-driven deployment invariant + test list additions) committed by dispatcher before subagent invocation; subagent adds manifest/runtime/configuration sections + 2 e2e tests + atomic three-way version bump.
